zh.iahmany, Hy-maine, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍曼恩
zh.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief於大約1350年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍曼恩。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1401年享年52歲。

zh-hans.iahmany, Hy-maine, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍曼恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief于大约1350年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍曼恩。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1401年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Kelly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Dermot, Eoin.
Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, see Kelly .

variants.name: Kelly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Aileen, John Patrick, Siobhan, Liam, Brigid, Donovan, Eamon, Parnell, Aidan, Clancy.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceallaigh, or, in some areas, Mac Ceallaigh ‘descendant (or son) of Ceallach’, an ancient Irish personal name, originally a byname meaning ‘bright-headed’, later understood as ‘frequenting churches’ (Irish ceall). There are several early Irish saints who bore this name. Kelly is now the most common of all surnames in Ireland.

Scottish: habitational name from either the lands of Kelly, near Arbroath (Angus), Kellie in Carnbee (Fife), or Kelly in Methlick (Aberdeenshire). Each of these placenames is from Pictish celli or Gaelic coille ‘wood’ + the placename forming suffix -in. Alternatively, from the lands of Kelloe in the barony of Hume (Berwickshire), whose name is of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Murtogh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Declan, Eamon, Eamonn, Fintan, Maeve.

midland Anglicized form of Ó Muircheartaigh ‘descendant of Muircheartach’ a personal name meaning ‘navigator’; compare Moriarty in Munster. See also Scottish Murdoch . Variants with a final -ie or -y may also be shortened forms of McMurdie etc., from the same personal name.

variants.name: Moriarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Seamus, Aidan, Bridie, Caitlin, Dermot, Fergus, Paddy.

Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muircheartaigh ‘descendant of Muircheartach’, a personal name from muir ‘sea’ + ceardach ‘skilled’, i.e. ‘skilled navigator’. A Meath and Monaghan name of the same form in Irish is Anglicized as Murtagh , comparable to Scottish Murdoch . It may also be a shortened form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh ‘son of Muircheartach’, see McMurdie .

variants.name: Murtaugh
meanings: Irish: variant of   Murtagh  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Murtha
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief was born about 1350, in Maine, County Tyrone, Ireland. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1401, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief est né environ 1350, à Maine, County Tyrone, Irlande. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1401, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief wurde um 1350 in Maine, County Tyrone, Irland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1401 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief è nato il circa 1350 nel Maine, County Tyrone, Irlanda. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1401, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.iahmany, Hy-maine, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ トイロンメイン
ja.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chiefは約1350年にアイルランドコウントイ トイロンメインで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1401年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief(은)는 대략 1350년 아일랜드 카운티 타이론 맹에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Maine, County Tyrone, Irlanda. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1401, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief родился около 1350 г. в местности меин, коунти тироун, Ирландия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1401 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Murtogh Maeleachlann O'Kelly Chief nació aproximadamente 1350, en Maine, County Tyrone, Irlanda. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1401, a la edad de 52 años.
